R T 3 T P p t i ' " - ? r ^ t % [tpT.U \-1101S/1/2001-^o-stoTT^To] MINISTRY OFHOME AFFAIRS CORRIGENDUM New Delhi, the 4th February, 2002 G.S.R. 80(E), — In the English version of the notification of the Government of India in the Ministry of Home Affairs number G.S.R. 6(E) dated the 2nd January, 2002. published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part il, Section 3, Sub-section (i) of the same date, regarding extension of the Maharashtra Control of Organised Crime Act, 1999 (Maharashtra Act No. XXX of 1999) to the National Capital Territory of Delhi,— (i) at page 28, in line 18, for "Additional Commissioner of Police", read "Special Commissioner of Police"; (ii) at page 29, in line 20, for "Additional Commissioner of Police", read "Special Commissioner of Police". [File No. U-l 1015/1/2001-UTL] P.K.JALALI, Jt.
